summary: Frontend-only testing of the new Agent Detail page Purchase Panel (Rent/Acquire split UI) + themed Live Demo modal. All 15+ critical UI flows pass on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Dynamic pricing math is correct, theme variables drive every surface, and the marketplace 'Rent' badge renders on every card.
passed_tests: GET /agent/1 renders agent-detail-page with title 'Customer Service Pro', creator @CXMaster (verified), rating 4.9 (124 reviews), trust 98, stats grid (847 deploys / <15 min / 124 users)
PurchasePanel: both tabs present (purchase-tab-rent default active, purchase-tab-acquire)
Rent tab: rent-panel visible by default with output-slider (default value=500), price breakdown ('500 outputs x $15/100'), platform fee $0, Total $75
Slider dynamic pricing: 500 -> $75 (default), 3000 -> $450, 10000 (max) -> $1500 — math = (count/100) * pricePerHundred where pricePerHundred=max(5, round(49*0.3))=15
Rent panel: Stripe + Crypto payment badges + '256-bit encrypted' label visible
Acquire tab click switches to acquire-panel: shows 'ONE-TIME ACQUISITION', price $2,994 (=buyPrice 499 * 6), 'Lifetime ownership. No recurring costs.'
Acquire panel: all 4 value props rendered (Full IP Ownership, Edit Node Logic, Your Own Compute, Unlimited Outputs) each with icon + desc
buy-agent-btn shows 'Buy Outright — $2,994'; Stripe + Crypto badges + 'Escrow protected' visible
Overview & Reviews tabs (tab-overview, tab-reviews) toggle their respective tab-content sections
Live Demo modal: agent-demo-btn opens live-demo-modal; inline style uses var(--bg-elevated) and var(--border) — theme-aware (no hardcoded dark)
Theme toggle (theme-toggle-btn): flips data-theme attribute (light <-> dark), agent-detail-page remains fully rendered; demo modal re-themed correctly
Mobile 390x844: purchase panel stacks below info card, tabs stay accessible, slider works (2000 -> $300), Acquire panel renders with all value props
/marketplace: 10 agent cards rendered; 'Rent' text appears 11 times (10 badges + 1 subtitle)
critical_code_review_comments: AgentDetail.jsx is now ~440 lines with three components in one file (LiveDemoModal, PurchasePanel, AgentDetail). Consider extracting LiveDemoModal and PurchasePanel into their own files under /pages/agent-detail/ for maintainability (file size guideline).

handleCheckout in PurchasePanel sets checkingOut=null in finally path that's outside try/catch — minor: if window.location.href succeeds the redirect happens before the state reset, fine. But on network error the toast is shown AND state is reset, which is correct.
Inline gradient backgrounds on Buy Outright button (linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6, #6D28D9)) are not theme-variabled — acceptable since brand violet is intentional in both themes.
demoResponses object hardcodes responses keyed by agent.id (1-6). For agents with id > 6 the fallback string is used; not a bug, but consider sourcing demo replies from agent payload for scalability.
PurchasePanel computes pricePerHundred and acquirePrice on every render — fine for now, could useMemo if Agent payload grows.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded agent id=1 (Customer Service Pro, price=49, buyPrice=499)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent Detail Purchase Panel is fully working & theme-aware. Key testids: purchase-tab-rent, purchase-tab-acquire, output-slider (HTML range, fill() works), rent-agent-btn, buy-agent-btn, rent-panel, acquire-panel, agent-detail-page, agent-demo-btn, live-demo-modal, close-demo-modal, tab-overview, tab-reviews. Default rent for agent 1 = $75 (500 outputs * $15/100). Acquire = $2,994 (buyPrice 499 * 6). Theme toggle id = theme-toggle-btn / theme-toggle-mobile. Marketplace has 10 agent cards each with a 'Rent' badge near price.
